title: Minecraft Enhanced
description: Added tons of tweaks and fixes to make your Minecraft better.
body:
## Minecraft Enhanced: Exploration of Vanilla++

The Minecraft Enhanced is a modpack created by bhop4real. It aims to **lift your game experience up to the next level** with mods, resource packs and shaders.

---

This modpack contains:

- ⚡Optimizations: Let the game runs smoothly even on mid-range PCs, or even your phone.
- 💃Animations: Make your Minecraft more vivid.
- 🤩Texture: The refreshed textures changed the game.
- 🧩QoL Features & Fixes: Tired of the ordinary design? 10+ QoL mods and fixes make your life easier.
- 🎶Epic music and sounds: Nothings much to say, it's literally C418-Tier
